===rl_core/grpo_algorithm.py head===
# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from typing import Any, Callable, Dict, List, Optional

from swift.rl_core.data import GRPOSample
from swift.utils import get_logger

logger = get_logger()


def _is_async_reward(func: Callable) -> bool:
    import asyncio
    return asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(func) or asyncio.iscoroutinefunction(getattr(func, '__call__', None))


def compute_rewards_per_func(
    samples: List[GRPOSample],
    reward_funcs: List[Callable],
    reward_model_plugins: List[Optional[Any]],
    device: torch.device,
    trainer_state: Optional[Any] = None,
    extra_reward_kwargs: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
) -> torch.Tensor:
    """Compute per-function rewards for ``samples``.

    Supports sync reward callables, async reward callables (auto-detected and
    run via ``asyncio.run``), and reward models (``nn.Module`` instances) via
    ``reward_model_plugins``.

    Args:
        samples: On-policy samples carrying completions in ``messages[-1]``.
        reward_funcs: Reward callables / models.
        reward_model_plugins: Optional model plugins aligned with ``reward_funcs``.
        device: Target device for the returned tensor.
        trainer_state: Passed to reward functions as ``trainer_state`` kwarg.

    Returns:
        ``[N, n_funcs]`` tensor of rewards.
    """
    if reward_model_plugins is None:
        reward_model_plugins = [None] * len(reward_funcs)
    async_indices = [i for i, func in enumerate(reward_funcs) if _is_async_reward(func)]

    rewards_per_func = torch.zeros((len(samples), len(reward_funcs)), device=device)
    completions = [s.messages[-1]['content'] for s in samples]

    reward_kwargs: Dict[str, Any] = {'trainer_state': trainer_state}
    if extra_reward_kwargs:
        reward_kwargs.update(extra_reward_kwargs)
===trainers/trainer_factory.py===
# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
import importlib.util
import inspect
from dataclasses import asdict
from typing import Dict

from swift.utils import get_logger

logger = get_logger()


class TrainerFactory:
    TRAINER_MAPPING = {
        'causal_lm': 'swift.trainers.Seq2SeqTrainer',
        'seq_cls': 'swift.trainers.Trainer',
        'embedding': 'swift.trainers.EmbeddingTrainer',
        'reranker': 'swift.trainers.RerankerTrainer',
        'generative_reranker': 'swift.trainers.RerankerTrainer',
        # rlhf
        'dpo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.DPOTrainer',
        'orpo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.ORPOTrainer',
        'kto': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.KTOTrainer',
        'cpo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.CPOTrainer',
        'rm': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.RewardTrainer',
        'ppo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.PPOTrainer',
        'grpo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.GRPOTrainer',
        'gkd': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.GKDTrainer',
    }

    TRAINING_ARGS_MAPPING = {
        'causal_lm': 'swift.trainers.Seq2SeqTrainingArguments',
        'seq_cls': 'swift.trainers.TrainingArguments',
        'embedding': 'swift.trainers.TrainingArguments',
        'reranker': 'swift.trainers.TrainingArguments',
        'generative_reranker': 'swift.trainers.TrainingArguments',
        # rlhf
        'dpo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.DPOConfig',
        'orpo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.ORPOConfig',
        'kto': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.KTOConfig',
        'cpo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.CPOConfig',
        'rm': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.RewardConfig',
        'ppo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.PPOConfig',
        'grpo': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.GRPOConfig',
        'gkd': 'swift.rlhf_trainers.GKDConfig',
    }

    @staticmethod
    def get_cls(args, mapping: Dict[str, str]):
        if hasattr(args, 'rlhf_type'):
            train_method = args.rlhf_type
        else:
            train_method = args.task_type
        module_path, class_name = mapping[train_method].rsplit('.', 1)
        module = importlib.import_module(module_path)
        return getattr(module, class_name)

    @classmethod
    def get_trainer_cls(cls, args):
        return cls.get_cls(args, cls.TRAINER_MAPPING)

    @classmethod
    def get_training_args(cls, args):
        training_args_cls = cls.get_cls(args, cls.TRAINING_ARGS_MAPPING)
        args_dict = asdict(args)
        parameters = inspect.signature(training_args_cls).parameters

        for k in list(args_dict.keys()):
            if k not in parameters:
                args_dict.pop(k)

        args._prepare_training_args(args_dict)
        training_args = training_args_cls(**args_dict)
        return training_args

    def get_cls(args, mapping: Dict[str, str]):
        if hasattr(args, 'rlhf_type'):
            train_method = args.rlhf_type
        else:
            train_method = args.task_type
        module_path, class_name = mapping[train_method].rsplit('.', 1)
        module = importlib.import_module(module_path)
        return getattr(module, class_name)

    @classmethod
    def get_trainer_cls(cls, args):
        return cls.get_cls(args, cls.TRAINER_MAPPING)

    @classmethod
    def get_training_args(cls, args):
        training_args_cls = cls.get_cls(args, cls.TRAINING_ARGS_MAPPING)
        args_dict = asdict(args)
        parameters = inspect.signature(training_args_cls).parameters

        for k in list(args_dict.keys()):
            if k not in parameters:
                args_dict.pop(k)

        args._prepare_training_args(args_dict)
        training_args = training_args_cls(**args_dict)
        return training_args

===infer_engine/base.py head===
# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from typing import AsyncIterator, Iterator, List, Optional, Union

from swift.metrics import Metric
from .protocol import ChatCompletionResponse, ChatCompletionStreamResponse, InferRequest, RequestConfig


class BaseInferEngine(ABC):

    @abstractmethod
    def infer(self,
              infer_requests: List[InferRequest],
              request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
              metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None,
              *,
              use_tqdm: Optional[bool] = None,
              **kwargs) -> List[Union[ChatCompletionResponse, Iterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]]:
        """
        This method performs inference on a list of inference requests.

        The method takes a list of inference requests and processes them according to the provided configuration.
        It can optionally use tqdm for progress visualization and accept additional keyword arguments.

        Args:
            infer_requests (List[InferRequest]): A list of inference requests to be processed.
            request_config (Optional[RequestConfig]): Configuration for the request, if any.
            metrics (Optional[List[Metric]]): A list of usage information to return.
            use_tqdm (Optional[bool]): Whether to use tqdm for progress visualization.
            **kwargs: Additional keyword arguments.

        Returns:
            List[Union[ChatCompletionResponse, Iterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]]:
                The result of the inference.
        """
        pass

    @abstractmethod
    async def infer_async(self,
                          infer_request: InferRequest,
                          request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
                          **kwargs) -> Union[ChatCompletionResponse, AsyncIterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]:
        """
        This method performs asynchronous inference on a single inference request.

        The method takes an inference request and processes it according to the provided configuration.
        It can accept additional keyword arguments.

        Args:
            infer_request (InferRequest): An inference request to be processed.
            request_config (Optional[RequestConfig]): Configuration for the request, if any.
            **kwargs: Additional keyword arguments.

        Returns:
            Union[ChatCompletionResponse, AsyncIterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]: The result of
                the asynchronous inference.
        """
        pass
===tuner_plugin/base.py head===
# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
import torch
from peft import PeftModel
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Optional

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from swift.arguments import SftArguments


class Tuner:
    """Base class for model tuners that adapt pre-trained models for specific tasks."""

    @staticmethod
    def prepare_model(args: 'SftArguments', model: torch.nn.Module) -> torch.nn.Module:
        """Prepare a new model with a tuner.

        Args:
            args: The training arguments containing tuner configuration.
            model: The model instance to be wrapped.

        Returns:
            The wrapped model with tuner applied.
        """
        raise NotImplementedError

    @staticmethod
    def save_pretrained(
        model: torch.nn.Module,
        save_directory: str,
        state_dict: Optional[dict] = None,
        safe_serialization: bool = True,
        **kwargs,
    ) -> None:
        """Save the model checkpoint.

        Args:
            model: The wrapped model by `prepare_model`.
            save_directory: The directory path where the model will be saved.
            state_dict: The model's state_dict, used during DeepSpeed training.
                Only contains trainable parameters
            safe_serialization: Whether to use safetensors format for serialization. Defaults to True.
            **kwargs: Additional keyword arguments for saving.
        """
        raise NotImplementedError

    @staticmethod
    def from_pretrained(model: torch.nn.Module, model_id: str, **kwargs) -> torch.nn.Module:
        """Load a model from a checkpoint directory.

        Args:
            model: The original model instance.
            model_id: The model identifier or checkpoint directory path to load from.
            **kwargs: Additional keyword arguments for loading.

        Returns:
            The wrapped model instance with loaded weights.
        """
        raise NotImplementedError


class PeftTuner(Tuner):
    """Tuner implementation using the PEFT library."""

    @staticmethod
    def save_pretrained(
        model: torch.nn.Module,
        save_directory: str,
        state_dict: Optional[dict] = None,
        safe_serialization: bool = True,
        **kwargs,

content.content:
===Architecture.md===
# Architecture Introduction

ms-swift 4.0 adopts a modular design, with functional modules distributed in first-level directories, making it convenient for developers to perform custom extensions. This document will provide a detailed introduction to the functions of each module and customization methods.

## Agent Template

The mapping file for agent templates can be found [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/swift/agent_template/mapping.py). The design goal of agent template is to flexibly switch between different models for training based on a unified Agent dataset format, without modifying the data. During training, use `--agent_template` to specify the corresponding agent template.

All AgentTemplates need to inherit from `BaseAgentTemplate` and implement several methods: `_format_tools`, `_format_tool_calls`, `_format_tool_responses`, `get_toolcall`.
- _format_tools: Format `tools` and `system` to compose a complete system.
- _format_tool_calls: Format the tool_call part `[{"role": "tool_call", "content": "..."}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "..."}]` and finally return a string.
- _format_tool_responses: Format the tool (also called tool_response) part `[{"role": "tool", "content": "..."}, {"role": "tool", "content": "..."}]`.
- get_toolcall: Used during deployment to parse the tool name and parameters from the model output content, returning `List[Function]`.


How to debug:
```python
data = {"tools": "[{\"type\": \"function\", \"function\": {\"name\": \"realtime_aqi\", \"description\": \"天气预报。获取实时空气质量。当前空气质量，PM2.5，PM10信息\", \"parameters\": {\"type\": \"object\", \"properties\": {\"city\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"description\": \"城市名，例如：上海\"}}, \"required\": [\"city\"]}}}]", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "北京和上海今天的天气情况"}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "{\"name\": \"realtime_aqi\", \"arguments\": {\"city\": \"北京\"}}"}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "{\"name\": \"realtime_aqi\", \"arguments\": {\"city\": \"上海\"}}"}, {"role": "tool_response", "content": "{\"city\": \"北京\", \"aqi\": \"10\", \"unit\": \"celsius\"}"}, {"role": "tool_response", "content": "{\"city\": \"上海\", \"aqi\": \"72\", \"unit\": \"fahrenheit\"}"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "根据天气预报工具，北京今天的空气质量指数为10，属于良好水平；上海今天的空气质量指数为72，属于轻度污染水平。"}]}


from swift import get_processor, get_template

tokenizer = get_processor('Qwen/Qwen3.5-2B')
template = get_template(tokenizer)  # Use default agent template
# template = get_template(tokenizer, agent_template='qwen3_5')
print(f'agent_template: {template._agent_template}')
template.set_mode('train')
encoded = template.encode(data)
print(f'[INPUT_IDS] {template.safe_decode(encoded["input_ids"])}\n')
print(f'[LABELS] {template.safe_decode(encoded["labels"])}')
```

If you want to provide us with a PR, please refer to [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/tests/test_align/test_template/test_agent.py) to write your test cases.

## Callbacks

The mapping file for callbacks can be found [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/swift/callbacks/mapping.py). Callbacks can customize the behavior at key points in the trainer. After customization, you need to register them in the mapping and use `--callbacks` to specify the corresponding callback class during training. For example, you can customize:

```python
class CustomCallback(TrainerCallback):

    def on_train_begin(self, args: TrainingArguments, state: TrainerState, control: TrainerControl, **kwargs):
        # Doing something when the training begins.
        pass

    def on_save(self, args: TrainingArguments, state: TrainerState, control: TrainerControl, **kwargs):
        # Doing something when save checkpoint
        pass
```

All callback classes need to inherit from `TrainerCallback` in base.py and override its methods. The interface is consistent with transformers' `TrainerCallback`, please refer to transformers' [callback documentation](https://huggingface.co/docs/transformers/main_classes/callback).

## Loss

The mapping file for Loss can be found [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/swift/loss/mapping.py).
Swift supports custom loss (currently only supports sft/pretrain/reranker/embedding tasks). After registration, set `--loss_type <loss-name>` during training to use your custom loss method.

Custom Loss needs to inherit from `BaseLoss` and implement the `__call__` method, returning a scalar Tensor. You can refer to [CustomCrossEntropyLoss](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/0d7c9f5bc0e7e7d67d914ce6edeb9ce24f60746f/swift/loss/causal_lm.py#L5) for customization. For example:

```python
class CustomLoss(BaseLoss):

    def __call__(self, outputs, labels, **kwargs) -> torch.Tensor:
        pass
```

## Loss Scale

The mapping file for loss scale can be found [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/swift/loss_scale/mapping.py). In pretrain and sft tasks, the loss of trainable tokens is averaged, meaning each token is treated equally. However, in some cases, certain tokens need extra attention and should be assigned higher weights, or some tokens should not be trained. loss_scale allows developers to freely define their own token weights. (Pretrain and SFT support using loss_scale to control whether tokens participate in training and their weight sizes, while in RLHF, it only supports controlling whether tokens participate in training)

You can customize loss scale by inheriting the LossScale base class and implementing the `get_loss_scale` method.

```python
class CustomLossScale(LossScale):

    def get_loss_scale(self, context: str, **kwargs) -> Tuple[List[str], List[float]]:
        ...
```

The `get_loss_scale` function returns a Tuple. The first return is a list of decomposed strings, and the second parameter is a list of loss_scales corresponding to the strings. The float value represents the weight. For example, the following weight setting:

```text
["学习", "好", "数学", "是", "重要", "的"]
[1.0, 0.5, 2.0, 0.5, 2.0, 0.1]
```
In the example, we place more emphasis on the words "数学" and "重要" because their loss_scale is 2.0.

Of course, we also need to pay attention to the core logic of the `__call__` method, namely the influence of the loss_scale base strategy (base_strategy) all/default/last_round on loss_scale. For details, refer to the introduction in the [Command-line Parameters Documentation](../Instruction/Command-line-parameters.md). Also, refer to the influence of the 'loss' field in the dataset on loss_scale in the [Custom Dataset Documentation](../Customization/Custom-dataset.md).

```python
if loss or loss is None and (self.base_strategy == 'all' or
                            (self.base_strategy == 'default' and is_assistant) or
                            (self.base_strategy == 'last_round' and is_assistant and is_last_round)):
    new_context, loss_scale = self.get_loss_scale(context, query=query)
else:
    new_context, loss_scale = [context], [0.]
```

In addition, you can also use [JSON configuration files](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/tree/main/swift/loss_scale/config) and inherit the built-in ConfigLossScale class to customize loss_scale. Currently, two configuration methods are supported: exact string matching and regular expression matching. You can refer to the content in [Agent Support Documentation](../Instruction/Agent-support.md#usage-of-loss_scale) for understanding.

- Exact string matching, for example, refer to `react.json`, `qwen.json`. The JSON needs to contain a mapping of `Dict[str, List[float]]`. The string represents a keyword, and the list needs to have two values. We will split the string into multiple segments based on the keyword. The first value in the list represents the weight of the keyword, and the second value represents the weight of the content after this keyword and before the next keyword.
- Regular expression matching, for example, refer to `ignore_empty_think.json`, `hermes.json`. The JSON needs to contain a mapping of `Dict[str, float]`. The string represents a regular expression pattern, and the float represents the weight of the matching string.

How to debug:

```python
from swift import get_processor, get_template

data = {"messages": [
    {"role": "user", "content": "What is today's date?"},
    {"role": "assistant", "content": (
        "<think>\nI can get the current time by calling the `get_date` function.\n</think>\n"
        '<tool_call>\n{"name": "get_date", "arguments": {}}\n</tool_call>'
    )}
]}

template = get_template(get_processor('Qwen/Qwen3-8B'), loss_scale='hermes')
template.set_mode('train')
inputs = template.encode(data)

- _format_tool_calls: Format the tool_call part `[{"role": "tool_call", "content": "..."}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "..."}]` and finally return a string.
- _format_tool_responses: Format the tool (also called tool_response) part `[{"role": "tool", "content": "..."}, {"role": "tool", "content": "..."}]`.
- get_toolcall: Used during deployment to parse the tool name and parameters from the model output content, returning `List[Function]`.


How to debug:
```python
data = {"tools": "[{\"type\": \"function\", \"function\": {\"name\": \"realtime_aqi\", \"description\": \"天气预报。获取实时空气质量。当前空气质量，PM2.5，PM10信息\", \"parameters\": {\"type\": \"object\", \"properties\": {\"city\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"description\": \"城市名，例如：上海\"}}, \"required\": [\"city\"]}}}]", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "北京和上海今天的天气情况"}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "{\"name\": \"realtime_aqi\", \"arguments\": {\"city\": \"北京\"}}"}, {"role": "tool_call", "content": "{\"name\": \"realtime_aqi\", \"arguments\": {\"city\": \"上海\"}}"}, {"role": "tool_response", "content": "{\"city\": \"北京\", \"aqi\": \"10\", \"unit\": \"celsius\"}"}, {"role": "tool_response", "content": "{\"city\": \"上海\", \"aqi\": \"72\", \"unit\": \"fahrenheit\"}"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "根据天气预报工具，北京今天的空气质量指数为10，属于良好水平；上海今天的空气质量指数为72，属于轻度污染水平。"}]}


from swift import get_processor, get_template

tokenizer = get_processor('Qwen/Qwen3.5-2B')
template = get_template(tokenizer)  # Use default agent template
# template = get_template(tokenizer, agent_template='qwen3_5')
print(f'agent_template: {template._agent_template}')
template.set_mode('train')
encoded = template.encode(data)
print(f'[INPUT_IDS] {template.safe_decode(encoded["input_ids"])}\n')
print(f'[LABELS] {template.safe_decode(encoded["labels"])}')
```

If you want to provide us with a PR, please refer to [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/tests/test_align/test_template/test_agent.py) to write your test cases.

## Callbacks

The mapping file for callbacks can be found [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/swift/callbacks/mapping.py). Callbacks can customize the behavior at key points in the trainer. After customization, you need to register them in the mapping and use `--callbacks` to specify the corresponding callback class during training. For example, you can customize:

```python
class CustomCallback(TrainerCallback):

    def on_train_begin(self, args: TrainingArguments, state: TrainerState, control: TrainerControl, **kwargs):
        # Doing something when the training begins.
        pass

    def on_save(self, args: TrainingArguments, state: TrainerState, control: TrainerControl, **kwargs):
        # Doing something when save checkpoint
        pass
```

All callback classes need to inherit from `TrainerCallback` in base.py and override its methods. The interface is consistent with transformers' `TrainerCallback`, please refer to transformers' [callback documentation](https://huggingface.co/docs/transformers/main_classes/callback).

## Loss

The mapping file for Loss can be found [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/swift/loss/mapping.py).
Swift supports custom loss (currently only supports sft/pretrain/reranker/embedding tasks). After registration, set `--loss_type <loss-name>` during training to use your custom loss method.

Custom Loss needs to inherit from `BaseLoss` and implement the `__call__` method, returning a scalar Tensor. You can refer to [CustomCrossEntropyLoss](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/0d7c9f5bc0e7e7d67d914ce6edeb9ce24f60746f/swift/loss/causal_lm.py#L5) for customization. For example:

```python
class CustomLoss(BaseLoss):

    def __call__(self, outputs, labels, **kwargs) -> torch.Tensor:
        pass
```

## Loss Scale

The mapping file for loss scale can be found [here](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/blob/main/swift/loss_scale/mapping.py). In pretrain and sft tasks, the loss of trainable tokens is averaged, meaning each token is treated equally. However, in some cases, certain tokens need extra attention and should be assigned higher weights, or some tokens should not be trained. loss_scale allows developers to freely define their own token weights. (Pretrain and SFT support using loss_scale to control whether tokens participate in training and their weight sizes, while in RLHF, it only supports controlling whether tokens participate in training)

You can customize loss scale by inheriting the LossScale base class and implementing the `get_loss_scale` method.

```python
class CustomLossScale(LossScale):

    def get_loss_scale(self, context: str, **kwargs) -> Tuple[List[str], List[float]]:
        ...
```

The `get_loss_scale` function returns a Tuple. The first return is a list of decomposed strings, and the second parameter is a list of loss_scales corresponding to the strings. The float value represents the weight. For example, the following weight setting:

```text
["学习", "好", "数学", "是", "重要", "的"]
[1.0, 0.5, 2.0, 0.5, 2.0, 0.1]
```
In the example, we place more emphasis on the words "数学" and "重要" because their loss_scale is 2.0.

Of course, we also need to pay attention to the core logic of the `__call__` method, namely the influence of the loss_scale base strategy (base_strategy) all/default/last_round on loss_scale. For details, refer to the introduction in the [Command-line Parameters Documentation](../Instruction/Command-line-parameters.md). Also, refer to the influence of the 'loss' field in the dataset on loss_scale in the [Custom Dataset Documentation](../Customization/Custom-dataset.md).

```python
if loss or loss is None and (self.base_strategy == 'all' or
                            (self.base_strategy == 'default' and is_assistant) or
                            (self.base_strategy == 'last_round' and is_assistant and is_last_round)):
    new_context, loss_scale = self.get_loss_scale(context, query=query)
else:
    new_context, loss_scale = [context], [0.]
```

In addition, you can also use [JSON configuration files](https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift/tree/main/swift/loss_scale/config) and inherit the built-in ConfigLossScale class to customize loss_scale. Currently, two configuration methods are supported: exact string matching and regular expression matching. You can refer to the content in [Agent Support Documentation](../Instruction/Agent-support.md#usage-of-loss_scale) for understanding.

- Exact string matching, for example, refer to `react.json`, `qwen.json`. The JSON needs to contain a mapping of `Dict[str, List[float]]`. The string represents a keyword, and the list needs to have two values. We will split the string into multiple segments based on the keyword. The first value in the list represents the weight of the keyword, and the second value represents the weight of the content after this keyword and before the next keyword.
- Regular expression matching, for example, refer to `ignore_empty_think.json`, `hermes.json`. The JSON needs to contain a mapping of `Dict[str, float]`. The string represents a regular expression pattern, and the float represents the weight of the matching string.

How to debug:

```python
from swift import get_processor, get_template

data = {"messages": [
    {"role": "user", "content": "What is today's date?"},
    {"role": "assistant", "content": (
        "<think>\nI can get the current time by calling the `get_date` function.\n</think>\n"
        '<tool_call>\n{"name": "get_date", "arguments": {}}\n</tool_call>'
    )}
]}

template = get_template(get_processor('Qwen/Qwen3-8B'), loss_scale='hermes')
template.set_mode('train')
inputs = template.encode(data)

# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
import inspect
import torch
import transformers
from packaging import version
from peft.utils.other import ModulesToSaveWrapper
from transformers import TrainingArguments
from transformers.integrations import is_deepspeed_zero3_enabled
from typing import List, Union

from swift.arguments import SftArguments
from swift.trainers import calculate_max_steps
from swift.tuner_plugin import Tuner, tuners_map
from swift.tuners import Swift
from swift.utils import (activate_parameters, find_all_linears, find_embedding, find_norm, freeze_parameters,
                         get_logger, get_multimodal_target_regex)

logger = get_logger()


def apply_liger(model_type: str):
    try:
        from liger_kernel.transformers import (apply_liger_kernel_to_gemma, apply_liger_kernel_to_llama,
                                               apply_liger_kernel_to_mistral, apply_liger_kernel_to_mixtral,
                                               apply_liger_kernel_to_mllama, apply_liger_kernel_to_phi3,
                                               apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen2, apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen2_5_vl,
                                               apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen2_vl, apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen3)

        from swift.model import ModelType
        if model_type in (ModelType.llama, ModelType.llama3, ModelType.llama3_1, ModelType.llama3_2):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_llama()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.mistral):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_mistral()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.mixtral):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_mixtral()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.gemma, ModelType.gemma2):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_gemma()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.gemma3_text):
            from liger_kernel.transformers import apply_liger_kernel_to_gemma3_text
            apply_liger_kernel_to_gemma3_text()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.gemma3_vision, ModelType.gemma3n):
            from liger_kernel.transformers import apply_liger_kernel_to_gemma3
            apply_liger_kernel_to_gemma3()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.qwen2, ModelType.qwen2_5):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen2()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.qwen3, ModelType.qwen3_guard, ModelType.qwen3_thinking,
                            ModelType.qwen3_nothinking, ModelType.qwen3_coder):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen3()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.qwen3_moe, ModelType.qwen3_moe_thinking, ModelType.qwen3_coder):
            from liger_kernel.transformers import apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen3_moe
            apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen3_moe()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.qwen3_next, ModelType.qwen3_next_thinking):
            from liger_kernel.transformers import apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen3_next
            apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen3_next()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.phi3):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_phi3()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.llama3_2_vision):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_mllama()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.qwen2_vl):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen2_vl()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.qwen2_5_vl, ModelType.qwen3_vl, ModelType.qwen3_vl_moe, ModelType.qvq):
            apply_liger_kernel_to_qwen2_5_vl()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.chatglm4, ModelType.glm4):
            from liger_kernel.transformers import apply_liger_kernel_to_glm4
            apply_liger_kernel_to_glm4()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.chatglm4v, ModelType.glm4v):
            from liger_kernel.transformers import apply_liger_kernel_to_glm4v
            apply_liger_kernel_to_glm4v()
        elif model_type in (ModelType.glm4v_moe):
            from liger_kernel.transformers import apply_liger_kernel_to_glm4v_moe
===pipelines/export/export.py head===
# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
from typing import List, Optional, Union

from swift.arguments import ExportArguments
from swift.pipelines import SwiftPipeline
from swift.tuners import swift_to_peft_format
from swift.utils import get_logger
from .cached_dataset import export_cached_dataset
from .merge_lora import merge_lora
from .ollama import export_to_ollama
from .quant import quantize_model

logger = get_logger()


class SwiftExport(SwiftPipeline):
    args_class = ExportArguments
    args: args_class

    def run(self):
        args = self.args
        if args.to_peft_format:
            args.adapters[0] = swift_to_peft_format(args.adapters[0], args.output_dir)
        if args.merge_lora:
            output_dir = args.output_dir
            if args.to_peft_format or args.quant_method or args.to_ollama or args.push_to_hub:
                args.output_dir = None
            merge_lora(args)
            args.output_dir = output_dir  # recover
        if args.quant_method:
            quantize_model(args)
        elif args.to_ollama:
            export_to_ollama(args)
        elif args.to_cached_dataset:
            export_cached_dataset(args)
        elif args.to_hf or args.mcore_adapter and args.to_mcore:
            from swift.megatron import convert_mcore2hf
            convert_mcore2hf(args)
        elif args.to_mcore:
            from swift.megatron import convert_hf2mcore
            convert_hf2mcore(args)
        elif args.push_to_hub:
            model_dir = args.adapters and args.adapters[0] or args.model_dir
            assert model_dir, f'model_dir: {model_dir}'
            args.hub.push_to_hub(
                args.hub_model_id,
                model_dir,
                token=args.hub_token,
                private=args.hub_private_repo,
                commit_message=args.commit_message)


def export_main(args: Optional[Union[List[str], ExportArguments]] = None):
    return SwiftExport(args).main()

# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
# Reward Model Plugin implementations for GRPO training.
# This module provides plugins for integrating external reward models,
# including both discriminative reward models (with value heads) and
# generative reward models (LLM-as-judge style).

import re
import textwrap
import torch
from copy import deepcopy
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Dict, List

from swift.infer_engine import ChatCompletionResponse, RequestConfig, TransformersEngine
from swift.template import Template
from swift.utils import get_logger, to_device

logger = get_logger()


class DefaultRMPlugin:
    """
    Default Reward Model Plugin

    This class implements the default processing logic for reward models.
    It assumes that `self.model` is a classification model with a value head(output dimmension 1).
    The first logits value from the model's output is used as the reward score.
    """

    def __init__(self, model, template):
        self.model = model
        self.template: Template = template

    def __call__(self, inputs, **kwargs):
        batched_inputs = [self.template.encode(deepcopy(infer_request)) for infer_request in inputs]
        reward_inputs = to_device(self.template.data_collator(batched_inputs), self.model.device)

        with torch.inference_mode():
            return self.model(**reward_inputs).logits[:, 0]

# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
# Multi-turn Rollout Schedulers for GRPO training.
import asyncio
import json
from abc import ABC
from copy import deepcopy
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any, Dict, List, Optional, Union

from swift.infer_engine.protocol import (ChatCompletionResponse, ChatCompletionResponseChoice, RequestConfig,
                                         RolloutInferRequest, RolloutOutput)
from swift.template import Messages
from swift.utils import remove_response
from .gym_env import Env, envs

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    # Imported only for type hints; importing it at runtime pulls in vllm, which would make
    # `swift.rollout` (and thus GRPO trainer init) hard-require vllm even when use_vllm=False.
    from swift.infer_engine import GRPOVllmEngine


class RolloutScheduler(ABC):
    # Single Turn Rollout Scheduler
    def __init__(self,
                 infer_engine: Optional['GRPOVllmEngine'] = None,
                 max_turns: Optional[int] = None,
                 *args,
                 **kwargs):
        self.infer_engine = infer_engine
        # Tokenizer can be passed explicitly (e.g., in colocate mode where infer_engine may be None)
        self._tokenizer = kwargs.get('tokenizer', None)

content.thinking:
I now have a very comprehensive understanding of the ms-swift project. Let me design the tutorial manifest.

Project summary:
- **ms-swift** (Scalable lightWeight Infrastructure for Fine-Tuning) - v4.5.0.dev0
- A large model and multimodal large model fine-tuning and deployment framework by ModelScope
- Supports training (pretrain, sft, RLHF/GRPO), inference, evaluation, quantization, deployment
- 600+ text models, 400+ multimodal models
- Entry points: `swift` CLI → `swift.cli.main:cli_main`, `megatron` CLI → `swift.cli._megatron.main:cli_main`
- CLI subcommands: pt, sft, infer, merge-lora, web-ui, deploy, rollout, rlhf, sample, export, eval, app

Core architecture (modular, first-level dirs):
- `swift/cli/` - CLI entry dispatch (ROUTE_MAPPING, torchrun)
- `swift/arguments/` - argument dataclasses (base_args: data/model/template/generation/quant args)
- `swift/pipelines/` - orchestration (SwiftPipeline base; train/infer/export/eval/sampling/app)
- `swift/model/` - model loading, registry (MODEL_MAPPING), model_meta, model_arch, patcher
- `swift/template/` - Template system (chat format → tokens, multimodal), register, template_meta, 34 model template files
- `swift/dataset/` - dataset loading, preprocessor, packing, register
- `swift/tuners/` - lightweight tuners (LoRA, Adapter, etc.), SWIFT_MAPPING
- `swift/tuner_plugin/` - Tuner/PeftTuner abstraction (prepare_model/save/from_pretrained)
- `swift/trainers/` - Seq2SeqTrainer, TrainerFactory, mixin, patcher
- `swift/rlhf_trainers/` - DPO/KTO/GRPO/PPO/etc trainers
- `swift/rl_core/` - GRPO algorithm, advantage, resample
- `swift/rollout/` - multi-turn schedulers, gym_env
- `swift/rewards/` - orm, prm, rm_plugin
- `swift/infer_engine/` - TransformersEngine, VllmEngine, SglangEngine, LmdeployEngine
- `swift/megatron/` - Megatron parallel training (TP/PP/SP/CP/EP)
- `swift/sequence_parallel/` - ulysses, ring attention
- `swift/loss/` - custom loss
- `swift/loss_scale/` - token loss weights
- `swift/callbacks/` - trainer callbacks
- `swift/optimizers/` - galore, lorap, muon
- `swift/metrics/` - eval metrics
- `swift/agent_template/` - agent templates
- `swift/ray/`, `swift/ray_utils/` - Ray distributed
- `swift/ui/` - Web-UI

Now let me design the tutorial. This is a large project, so I'll aim for 25-32 lectures across 3 levels.

Let me structure the units:

**入门层 (beginner)** - Unit 1: 项目认知与上手
- u1-l1: 项目总览 (what is ms-swift, capabilities, ecosystem) - README, README_CN
- u1-l2: 安装与环境 (installation, dependencies, requirements) - setup.py, requirements/, README
- u1-l3: 目录结构与代码组织 (directory structure, modular design) - swift/__init__.py, Architecture.md
- u1-l4: CLI 入口与命令体系 (swift CLI dispatch, torchrun, subcommands) - swift/cli/main.py, ROUTE_MAPPING
- u1-l5: 快速上手 SFT (quick start: train + infer + export) - examples/train/lora_sft.sh, README Quick Start

**进阶层 (intermediate)** - 
Unit 2: 参数与配置体系
- u2-l1: Arguments 体系 (BaseArguments, data/model/template/generation/quant args composition) - swift/arguments/
- u2-l2: YAML/JSON 配置与命令行参数 (parse_yaml_args, config files) - swift/cli/main.py, examples/yaml

Unit 3: 模型与模板
- u3-l1: 模型注册与加载 (MODEL_MAPPING, ModelLoader, model_meta, get_model_processor) - swift/model/register.py, model_meta.py
- u3-l2: 模型架构与 ModelArch (model_arch, arch mapping, keys) - swift/model/model_arch.py
- u3-l3: Template 体系总览 (Template base, template_meta, register, encode flow) - swift/template/base.py, register.py, template_meta.py
- u3-l4: 多模态 Template 与特殊 token (special_tokens, vision_utils, multimodal placeholders) - swift/template/base.py, vision_utils.py

Unit 4: 数据集
- u4-l1: 数据集加载与注册 (DatasetLoader, DATASET_MAPPING, register) - swift/dataset/loader.py, register.py
- u4-l2: 数据预处理 Preprocessor (RowPreprocessor, Alpaca/Messages/Response preprocessor) - swift/dataset/preprocessor/
- u4-l3: Encode 与 Packing (EncodePreprocessor, Packing, padding_free) - swift/dataset/packing.py, preprocessor
- u4-l4: 自定义数据集 (custom dataset format, syntax) - swift/dataset/dataset_syntax.py, docs Custom-dataset

Unit 5: 训练器与 Tuner
- u5-l1: TrainerFactory 与 Trainer 体系 (TrainerFactory mapping, Seq2SeqTrainer, mixin) - swift/trainers/trainer_factory.py, seq2seq_trainer.py, mixin.py
- u5-l2: Tuner 与 TunerPlugin (Tuner/PeftTuner, tuners_map, prepare_model) - swift/tuner_plugin/, swift/pipelines/train/tuner.py
- u5-l3: LoRA 与轻量微调原理 (LoRA, Adapter, SWIFT_MAPPING) - swift/tuners/lora.py, mapping.py
- u5-l4: SFT 训练主流程 (SwiftSft pipeline: prepare model/template/dataset/trainer) - swift/pipelines/train/sft.py

Unit 6: 推理引擎
- u6-l1: 推理引擎抽象 (BaseInferEngine, InferRequest, RequestConfig, protocol) - swift/infer_engine/base.py, protocol.py
- u6-l2: 多后端推理 (Transformers/Vllm/Sglang/Lmdeploy engine) - swift/infer_engine/*_engine.py

**专家层 (advanced)**
Unit 7: RLHF 与强化学习
- u7-l1: RLHF 训练流程 (rlhf_main, rlhf args, TrainerFactory rlhf) - swift/pipelines/train/rlhf.py, swift/arguments/rlhf_args.py
- u7-l2: GRPO 算法核心 (rl_core grpo_algorithm, advantage, GRPOTrainer) - swift/rl_core/, swift/rlhf_trainers/grpo_trainer.py
- u7-l3: 奖励函数与 RM 插件 (rewards orm/prm/rm_plugin) - swift/rewards/
- u7-l4: 多轮 Rollout 与环境 (rollout schedulers, gym_env, agent_loop) - swift/rollout/

Unit 8: 部署与导出
- u8-l1: 导出与量化 (export pipeline, merge_lora, quant, ollama) - swift/pipelines/export/
- u8-l2: 部署与服务 (deploy, app, OpenAI compatible API) - swift/pipelines/infer/deploy.py, app/
- u8-l3: 评测 (eval pipeline, evalscope backend) - swift/pipelines/eval/eval.py

Unit 9: 分布式与高性能
- u9-l1: 分布式训练 (DDP, DeepSpeed, FSDP, torchrun, device_map) - swift/cli/main.py, docs
- u9-l2: 序列并行 (sequence_parallel, ulysses, ring attention) - swift/sequence_parallel/
- u9-l3: Megatron-SWIFT 总览 (megatron module, mcore bridge, convert) - swift/megatron/
- u9-l4: Megatron 训练流程 (megatron trainers, pipelines, args) - swift/megatron/trainers/, pipelines/
- u9-l5: Ray 分布式 (ray_utils, RayHelper, megatron-ray) - swift/ray_utils/, swift/ray/

Unit 10: 扩展机制与二次开发
- u10-l1: 自定义 Loss 与 Loss Scale - swift/loss/, swift/loss_scale/
- u10-l2: Callbacks 与 Optimizers 扩展 - swift/callbacks/, swift/optimizers/
- u10-l3: Agent Template 机制 - swift/agent_template/
- u10-l4: 自定义模型与模板注册 - swift/model/register.py, swift/template/register.py
- u10-l5: Web-UI 与 App - swift/ui/, swift/pipelines/app/

Hmm, that's about 30+ lectures. Let me count: u1(5) + u2(2) + u3(4) + u4(4) + u5(4) + u6(2) + u7(4) + u8(3) + u9(5) + u10(5) = 38. That might be a bit too many. Let me trim to keep it logical and around 30-32.

Actually the spec says "大型项目可以拆成 30 篇以上讲义". This is a large project so 30+ is fine. But let me make sure each is well-scoped and not artificially split. Let me consolidate a bit:

- Merge u2 into a single unit with 2 lectures (config + args) - keep
- u3 model+template (4) - keep
- u4 dataset (4) - keep
- u5 trainer+tuner (4) - keep
- u6 infer engine (2) - keep
- u7 RL (4) - keep
- u8 export/deploy/eval (3) - keep
- u9 distributed (5) → maybe trim to 4 (merge ray into megatron-ray or keep separate). Actually Ray is significant now (megatron-ray GRPO). Keep 5 but maybe merge sequence_parallel into distributed. Let me do: u9-l1 distributed basics, u9-l2 sequence parallel, u9-l3 megatron overview, u9-l4 megatron training, u9-l5 ray. Keep 5.

    Args:
        reward_model (Optional[List[str]]): The model ID or a local path to the reward model. Same as the `model`
            argument. Defaults to None.
        reward_adapters (List[str]): The path(s) to LoRA adapter weights to be loaded for the reward model. Useful for
            using LoRA weights from SFT as the reward model. Defaults to an empty list (`[]`).
        reward_model_type (Optional[List[str]]): The model type of the reward model. Same as the `model_type` argument.
            If not specified, it's often inferred. Defaults to None.
        reward_model_revision (Optional[List[str]]): The specific model version to use for the reward model. Same as
            the `model_revision` argument. Defaults to None.
        reward_template (Optional[List[str]]): The template to use for the reward model. Defaults to None.
    """

input.rationale: ms-swift 是 ModelScope 的大模型/多模态微调与部署框架，模块化程度高、功能链路长（训练-推理-评测-量化-部署）。本大纲按"从认知到上手、从单模块到全链路、从单机到分布式、从使用到扩展"的顺序设计：入门层先用 5 篇让读者建立项目定位、环境、目录、CLI 与快速跑通 SFT 的整体认知；进阶层按数据流顺序拆解参数、模型、模板、数据集、训练器与推理引擎六大核心子系统，每篇只解决一个子系统并给出可操作实践；专家层覆盖强化学习 GRPO、部署导出评测、分布式/序列并行/Megatron/Ray 高性能训练，以及 Loss、Callback、自定义注册、Web-UI 等二次开发扩展点。讲义间通过 depends_on 形成清晰依赖，确保读者按序学习时每一步都有前置知识支撑。

lectures.title: 项目总览与生态定位
lectures.topic: 介绍 ms-swift 是什么、解决什么问题、支持哪些模型与训练任务，以及它在 ModelScope 生态中的定位。
learning_goals: 理解 ms-swift 的定位：大模型与多模态大模型的微调与部署框架
了解支持的训练任务类型：pretrain/sft/rlhf/grpo/评测/量化/部署
认识项目支持的技术栈与硬件范围
minimal_modules: 支持的模型与训练方法概览
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README，列出 ms-swift 支持的 5 种训练任务及对应的一条 CLI 命令示例，并说明它与原生 transformers/peft 的差异。

lectures.title: 安装与环境依赖
lectures.topic: 讲解 ms-swift 的安装方式（pip/uv/源码）、可选依赖分组与运行环境要求。
learning_goals: 掌握 pip 与源码安装 ms-swift 的方法
理解 setup.py 中的 extras_require 分组（megatron/eval/ray 等）
了解 Python/torch/transformers/vllm 等版本要求
minimal_modules: setup.py 的依赖解析与 entry_points
lectures.practice_task: 在本地用源码方式安装 ms-swift（pip install -e .），并执行 `swift --help` 验证安装成功，记录遇到的依赖问题及解决方式。

lectures.title: 目录结构与模块化架构
lectures.topic: 梳理 swift 包的一级目录结构，解释模块化设计理念以及各模块职责。
learning_goals: 掌握 swift/ 下的核心一级模块划分
理解 arguments/pipelines/template/model/dataset/trainers 等模块职责
了解 Architecture.md 描述的模块化扩展思路
minimal_modules: swift 包顶层 _LazyModule 懒加载机制
lectures.practice_task: 依据 Architecture.md 绘制一张 ms-swift 模块依赖关系草图，标注出

lectures.title: CLI 入口与命令分发
lectures.topic: 解析 swift 命令行入口的注册与分发机制，包括子命令路由、torchrun 启动与 YAML 参数解析。
learning_goals: 理解 cli_main 的子命令路由表 ROUTE_MAPPING
掌握 torchrun/多卡启动的判定逻辑 use_torchrun
理解 parse_yaml_args 如何把 yaml/json 配置转成命令行参数
lectures.practice_task: 跟踪 `swift sft ...` 的执行路径，说明它如何被 main.py 路由并通过 torchrun 启动，并写一个最小 YAML 配置文件复现一条 sft 命令。

lectures.title: 快速上手：SFT 训练到推理全流程
lectures.topic: 用一个 LoRA 自我认知微调示例串起 sft 训练、infer 推理、export 推送三个阶段，建立端到端直觉。
learning_goals: 能用 swift sft 跑通一个 LoRA 微调
能用 swift infer 加载 adapter 进行推理
能用 swift export 合并/推送模型
minimal_modules: infer 加载 adapter 推理
lectures.practice_task: 在单卡上复现 README 的 Quick Start：用 Qwen3-4B + alpaca 数据 + LoRA 训练 500 步，再用 swift infer 验证效果，最后用 swift export --merge_lora 合并权重。

lectures.title: Arguments 数据类体系
lectures.topic: 讲解 BaseArguments 通过多继承组合 DataArguments/ModelArguments/TemplateArguments 等的参数体系设计。
learning_goals: 理解 BaseArguments 的多继承组合结构
掌握各 SftArguments/RLHFArguments 等如何派生
了解参数解析 parse_args 与 from_pretrained 机制
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 BaseArguments 的继承链，列出 SftArguments 相比 BaseArguments 额外引入了哪些字段组，并解释为何用 dataclass 组合而非单一巨型类。

lectures.title: 配置文件与命令行参数解析
lectures.topic: 讲解 YAML/JSON 配置文件、ENV 注入、命令行参数与 args.json 持久化的解析流程。
learning_goals: 掌握 parse_yaml_args 的配置展开逻辑
理解 ENV 块的环境变量注入
了解 args.json 在推理时自动回载的机制
lectures.practice_task: 为一条 sft 命令编写等价的 YAML 配置文件（含 ENV 块），用 `swift sft config.yaml` 方式运行并对比输出参数，验证两者一致。

lectures.title: 模型注册与加载机制
lectures.topic: 讲解 MODEL_MAPPING 注册表、ModelLoader、get_model_processor 如何根据模型 id 加载模型与 processor。
learning_goals: 理解 MODEL_MAPPING 与 register_model 注册机制
掌握 get_model_processor/get_processor 的加载流程
了解 ModelInfo/ModelMeta 的作用
lectures.practice_task: 用 get_model_processor 加载一个 Qwen 模型，打印其 model_info 与 model_meta，并说明 ModelMeta 中 template 字段如何与模板系统联动。

lectures.title: 模型架构 ModelArch 与 ModelKeys
lectures.topic: 讲解 ModelArch/ModelKeys/MultiModelKeys 如何描述模型结构，支撑 target_modules 选择与多模态分层控制。
learning_goals: 理解 MODEL_ARCH_MAPPING 与 get_model_arch
掌握 ModelKeys 如何定位 linear/embedding/norm
了解 MultiModelKeys 对多模态 vit/aligner/llm 的分层
lectures.practice_task: 查找某个模型的 ModelArch 定义，说明它的 ModelKeys 指向哪些模块，并解释这如何影响 LoRA 的 target_modules=all-linear 的实际命中范围。

lectures.title: Template 体系与对话格式
lectures.topic: 讲解 Template 基类如何把 messages 对话格式转换为 token 序列，以及 TEMPLATE_MAPPING 注册与 encode 流程。
learning_goals: 理解 Template 基类的职责与 encode/data_collator 流程
掌握 TEMPLATE_MAPPING 与 register_template 注册
了解 TemplateMeta 与 get_template 的匹配逻辑
lectures.practice_task: 用 get_template 取一个 Qwen 模板，对一段 messages 调用 template.encode，打印 input_ids 与 labels，说明 labels 中哪些部分被置为 -100。

lectures.title: 多模态 Template 与特殊 Token
lectures.topic: 讲解多模态模板如何处理 image/video/audio 占位符、特殊 token 与视觉工具函数。
learning_goals: 理解 special_tokens 与 image/video/audio 占位符机制
掌握 vision_utils 的图像/音频加载与预处理
了解多模态模板对 padding_free/packing 的支持差异
minimal_modules: 特殊 token 与占位符
lectures.practice_task: 用一个多模态模型（如 Qwen3-VL）的 template，encode 一条带 image 的对话，打印占位符替换前后的 input_ids，并说明图像像素如何与占位 token 对齐。

lectures.title: 数据集加载与注册
lectures.topic: 讲解 DatasetLoader、DATASET_MAPPING 注册表与 load_dataset 的加载流程，含数据集语法与子集。
learning_goals: 理解 DATASET_MAPPING 与 register_dataset 注册
掌握 DatasetLoader 从本地/hub 加载数据的流程
了解 DatasetSyntax 与 SubsetDataset 的数据集语法
lectures.practice_task: 用 load_dataset 加载一个内置数据集（如 swift/self-cognition）和一个本地 jsonl，对比两者的 DatasetMeta，并解释 `#500` 这类子集语法如何被解析。

lectures.title: 数据预处理器 Preprocessor
lectures.topic: 讲解 RowPreprocessor 及 Alpaca/Messages/Response 等预处理器如何把原始数据规范化为统一格式。
learning_goals: 理解 RowPreprocessor 的列映射与清理逻辑
掌握 Alpaca/Messages/Response 预处理器的适用场景
了解 AutoPreprocessor 的自动选择机制
lectures.practice_task: 准备一份 alpaca 格式与一份 messages 格式的 jsonl，分别用对应预处理器跑通，输出规范化后的统一 messages 结构，验证两者可被同一 template 消费。

lectures.title: 编码与 Packing 机制
lectures.topic: 讲解 EncodePreprocessor 把文本编码为 token、Packing 与 padding_free 如何提升训练效率。
learning_goals: 理解 EncodePreprocessor 的编码流程
掌握 PackingDataset/IterablePackingDataset 的拼接逻辑
了解 padding_free 与 packing 的适用条件与收益
lectures.practice_task: 对同一数据集分别开启与关闭 packing，统计编码后的样本数与平均长度变化，并说明 padding_free 为何能减少无效 padding。

lectures.title: 自定义数据集格式
lectures.topic: 讲解如何组织和注册自定义数据集，包括 messages/response_format/loss 字段等。
learning_goals: 掌握自定义数据集的标准格式与字段
理解 register_dataset_info 注册自定义数据集
了解 loss 字段与多轮对话数据组织
minimal_modules: 自定义数据集格式规范
lectures.practice_task: 将自己的业务数据整理成 ms-swift 的 messages 格式 jsonl，用 --dataset 指定本地路径跑通一次 sft，并尝试用 register_dataset_info 注册成内置数据集。

lectures.title: TrainerFactory 与训练器体系
lectures.topic: 讲解 TrainerFactory 如何根据 task_type/rlhf_type 选择 Trainer 与 TrainingArguments，以及 Seq2SeqTrainer 的结构。
learning_goals: 理解 TrainerFactory 的 TRAINER_MAPPING 与 TRAINING_ARGS_MAPPING
掌握 task_type 到 Trainer 的派发逻辑
了解 Seq2SeqTrainer/mixin/patcher 的职责
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 TrainerFactory，列出 causal_lm/seq_cls/embedding/reranker 分别对应哪个 Trainer，并说明 task_type 是如何在 args 中被确定的。

lectures.title: TunerPlugin 与模型适配
lectures.topic: 讲解 Tuner/PeftTuner 抽象与 tuners_map，以及 prepare_model/save_pretrained/from_pretrained 适配流程。
learning_goals: 理解 Tuner 基类的三个静态方法契约
掌握 PeftTuner 与 tuners_map 注册
了解 pipelines/train/tuner.py 中如何调用 Tuner 适配模型
lectures.practice_task: 跟踪一次 sft 中 prepare_model 的调用链，说明 Tuner 如何在模型上挂载可训练参数、冻结其余参数，并实现 save_pretrained 只保存 adapter。

lectures.title: LoRA 与轻量微调方法
lectures.topic: 讲解 LoRA/Adapter/LLaMAPro 等 SWIFT_MAPPING 轻量微调方法的原理与配置。
learning_goals: 理解 SWIFT_MAPPING 中各 tuner 的注册
掌握 LoRA/LoRAConfig 的关键参数
了解 peft 集成与 swift_to_peft_format 转换
lectures.practice_task: 分别用 lora、llamapro 两种 tuner 在同一小数据集上微调，对比可训练参数量与显存占用，并解释 lora_rank/lora_alpha/target_modules 的作用。

lectures.title: SFT 训练主流程 SwiftSft
lectures.topic: 讲解 SwiftSft 管道如何串联模型准备、模板准备、数据集准备与 Trainer 训练的完整流程。
learning_goals: 理解 SwiftPipeline 基类与 SwiftSft 的关系
掌握 _prepare_model_tokenizer/_prepare_template/_get_dataset 流程
了解 RayHelper 装饰器与训练启动
minimal_modules: 数据集与 Trainer 串联
lectures.practice_task: 梳理 SwiftSft.main 的执行顺序，画出从参数解析到 trainer.train 的时序图，并指出数据集编码发生在哪个阶段。

lectures.title: 推理引擎抽象与协议
lectures.topic: 讲解 BaseInferEngine 抽象、InferRequest/RequestConfig 协议与 OpenAI 兼容响应结构。
learning_goals: 理解 BaseInferEngine 的 infer/infer_async 接口
掌握 InferRequest/RequestConfig/ChatCompletionResponse 协议
了解 InferClient 与引擎的关系
lectures.practice_task: 用 TransformersEngine 直接构造一个 InferRequest 并调用 infer，打印 ChatCompletionResponse 结构，说明它与 OpenAI API 字段的对应关系。

lectures.title: 多后端推理引擎
lectures.topic: 讲解 Transformers/Vllm/Sglang/Lmdeploy 四种推理后端引擎的实现差异与选用。
learning_goals: 理解四种引擎的继承关系与差异
掌握 infer_backend 切换后端的机制
了解 GRPOVllmEngine 在 RL 中的特殊用途
lectures.practice_task: 对同一模型分别用 transformers 与 vllm 后端推理，对比延迟与输出，并说明切换后端时 template/RequestConfig 如何保持一致。

lectures.title: RLHF 训练流程
lectures.topic: 讲解 SwiftRLHF 管道如何复用 SwiftSft 并接入 DPO/KTO/GRPO 等 RLHF 训练器与参数。
learning_goals: 理解 SwiftRLHF 继承 SwiftSft 的复用设计
掌握 RLHFArguments 与 rlhf_type 派发
了解 reward model 参数与 vllm 支持类型
lectures.practice_task: 用 `swift rlhf --rlhf_type dpo` 跑通一个 DPO 小实验，对比它与 sft 在数据格式与 loss 上的差异，并说明 rlhf_support_vllm_types 包含哪些。

lectures.title: GRPO 算法核心
lectures.topic: 讲解 rl_core 中 GRPO 的优势计算、奖励聚合与 GRPOTrainer 的训练循环。
learning_goals: 理解 GRPOSample 数据结构与 advantage 计算
掌握 compute_rewards_per_func 的多奖励函数聚合
了解 GRPOTrainer 的 rollout+训练循环
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 grpo_algorithm.py，说明一个 batch 的 completions 如何被多奖励函数评分并聚合成 [N, n_funcs] 张量，再追踪 advantage 如何归一化。

lectures.title: 奖励函数与 RM 插件
lectures.topic: 讲解 rewards 模块的 orm/prm 奖励与 rm_plugin 如何接入判别式/生成式奖励模型。
learning_goals: 理解 orm/prm 奖励函数的差异
掌握 DefaultRMPlugin 对带 value head 模型的处理
了解生成式奖励模型（LLM-as-judge）接入方式
lectures.practice_task: 为 GRPO 训练编写一个自定义奖励函数（如根据输出长度或关键词打分），跑通一次小规模训练，并对比加/不加奖励模型插件的效果。

lectures.title: 多轮 Rollout 与环境交互
lectures.topic: 讲解 rollout 模块的多轮调度器、gym 环境与 agent_loop 如何支撑 agent 工具调用训练。
learning_goals: 理解 RolloutScheduler 多轮调度抽象
掌握 gym_env/Env 与 openenv_wrapper 的环境接入
了解 agent_loop 的工具调用循环
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个带工具调用的多轮 GRPO 实验（参考 examples 中 multi_turn），说明 RolloutScheduler 如何在每轮调用工具并把结果回填进对话。

lectures.title: 模型导出与量化
lectures.topic: 讲解 SwiftExport 管道如何完成 merge_lora、量化（GPTQ/AWQ/FP8/BNB）、ollama 导出与 mcore 转换。
learning_goals: 理解 SwiftExport 的分支式 run 流程
掌握 merge_lora 与 quantize_model 的实现
了解 ollama 导出与 hf/mcore 互转
lectures.practice_task: 对一个 LoRA adapter 执行 merge_lora，再用 --quant_method fp8 导出量化模型，对比量化前后的体积与推理效果。

lectures.title: 部署与服务化
lectures.topic: 讲解 swift deploy/app 如何基于 vllm/sglang 启动 OpenAI 兼容服务与交互界面。
learning_goals: 理解 deploy_main 与 run_deploy 的服务启动流程
掌握 app_main 的 Gradio 交互界面
了解 OpenAI 兼容 API 的协议实现
lectures.practice_task: 用 `swift deploy --infer_backend vllm` 启动服务，用 curl/openai 客户端调用 /v1/chat/completions 验证，再启动 swift app 对比交互体验。

lectures.title: 模型评测
lectures.topic: 讲解 swift eval 如何以 EvalScope 为后端完成文本与多模态模型评测。
learning_goals: 理解 eval_main 管道与 EvalScope 后端集成
掌握 eval_backend/eval_dataset 参数
了解评测指标与 infer_backend 的关系
lectures.practice_task: 用 `swift eval --eval_backend OpenCompass --eval_dataset ARC_c` 评测一个模型，记录指标并说明 infer_backend 选择对评测速度的影响。

lectures.title: 分布式训练基础
lectures.topic: 讲解 DDP/DeepSpeed ZeRO/FSDP/device_map 等分布式训练方式的启动与配置。
learning_goals: 理解 torchrun 启动与 NPROC_PER_NODE/NNODES 配置
掌握 DeepSpeed zero2/zero3 与 FSDP 的选用
了解 device_map 简单模型并行
lectures.practice_task: 用 NPROC_PER_NODE=2 + deepspeed zero2 跑通一个多卡 sft，对比单卡与多卡的显存和速度，并解释 zero2/zero3 的差异。

lectures.title: 序列并行 Ulysses 与 Ring-Attention
lectures.topic: 讲解 sequence_parallel 模块如何用 Ulysses 与 Ring-Attention 降低长文本训练显存。
learning_goals: 理解 sequence_parallel.prepare 的接入流程
掌握 Ulysses 与 Ring-Attention 的分片原理
了解 sequence_parallel_size 与 head 数约束
lectures.practice_task: 用 --sequence_parallel_size 2 在长文本数据上训练，对比开启前后的显存峰值，并说明 Ulysses 与 ring-attention 组合时 head 数约束为何被解除。

lectures.title: Megatron-SWIFT 架构总览
lectures.topic: 讲解 swift/megatron 模块的整体架构、mcore-bridge 与 hf/mcore 权重互转。
learning_goals: 理解 megatron 模块的目录与子模块职责
掌握 convert_hf2mcore/convert_mcore2hf 权重转换
了解 mcore-bridge 让 Megatron 像 transformers 一样易用的设计
lectures.practice_task: 用 `megatron` 命令的 convert 流程把一个 hf 模型转成 mcore 格式再转回，对比权重是否一致，并说明 mcore-bridge 的价值。

lectures.title: Megatron 训练流程
lectures.topic: 讲解 MegatronArguments 与 megatron trainers/pipelines 如何实现 TP/PP/SP/CP/EP 并行训练。
learning_goals: 理解 MegatronArguments 的并行参数
掌握 megatron_sft_main 与 MegatronTrainer 流程
了解 TP/PP/SP/CP/EP/VPP 并行策略
lectures.practice_task: 用 `megatron sft --tuner_type lora` 在 2 卡上跑通一个 MoE 或稠密模型训练，记录 TP/PP 配置，并对比与 swift sft 的速度差异。

lectures.title: Ray 分布式调度
lectures.topic: 讲解 ray_utils 的 RayHelper/RayArguments 与 megatron-ray 如何支撑跨机与异步 RL 训练。
learning_goals: 理解 RayHelper.worker/function 装饰器机制
掌握 RayArguments 的参数注入
了解 megatron-ray 在 GRPO/GKD 中的应用
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 RayHelper 在 SwiftSft 中的用法，说明 @RayHelper.worker/@RayHelper.function 如何把方法分发到 Ray actor，并尝试用 try_init_ray 启动一个 ray 会话。

lectures.title: 自定义 Loss 与 Loss Scale
lectures.topic: 讲解 loss/loss_scale 模块如何自定义损失函数与按 token 控制损失权重。
learning_goals: 理解 BaseLoss 与 loss_map 注册
掌握 LossScale 的 get_loss_scale 与 base_strategy
了解 JSON 配置式 loss_scale（精确/正则匹配）
lectures.practice_task: 实现一个自定义 Loss（继承 BaseLoss）并注册到 loss_map，用 --loss_type 跑通 sft；再用 hermes 这类 JSON loss_scale 控制特定 token 权重。

lectures.title: Callbacks、Optimizers 与 Metrics 扩展
lectures.topic: 讲解 callbacks/optimizers/metrics 三类扩展点的注册与使用。
learning_goals: 理解 TrainerCallback 与 callbacks_map 注册
掌握 OptimizerCallback 与 optimizers_map（galore/lorap/muon）
了解 eval_metrics_map 与自定义指标
lectures.practice_task: 实现一个自定义 Callback（如训练开始打印显存），注册并用 --callbacks 指定；再尝试用 galore/lorap 优化器跑一次训练对比显存。

lectures.title: 自定义模型、模板与 Agent 注册
lectures.topic: 讲解如何通过 register_model/register_template/agent_template 注册自定义模型、模板与 Agent 模板。
learning_goals: 掌握 register_model 注册自定义模型
掌握 register_template 注册自定义模板
理解 BaseAgentTemplate 与 agent_template_map
lectures.practice_task: 为一个新模型注册自定义 ModelMeta+Template（或 Agent 模板），用 get_template/get_model_processor 验证可用，并参考 tests 写一个最小测试。

lectures.title: Web-UI 与 App 交互
lectures.topic: 讲解 swift web-ui 与 app 模块如何以 Gradio 提供 zero-threshold 的训练/推理/评测界面。
learning_goals: 理解 web-ui 的启动与 UI 模块组织
掌握 app/build_ui 的界面构建
了解 UI 如何复用 pipelines 与 arguments
lectures.practice_task: 启动 `swift web-ui`，分别体验训练/推理/导出面板，并阅读 build_ui 说明 UI 如何把表单参数映射到对应 arguments 与 pipeline。

data.head: 3d61b9318b27fdd5659e530cd36db7f4ce740fd7
data.rationale: ms-swift 是 ModelScope 的大模型/多模态微调与部署框架，模块化程度高、功能链路长（训练-推理-评测-量化-部署）。本大纲按"从认知到上手、从单模块到全链路、从单机到分布式、从使用到扩展"的顺序设计：入门层先用 5 篇让读者建立项目定位、环境、目录、CLI 与快速跑通 SFT 的整体认知；进阶层按数据流顺序拆解参数、模型、模板、数据集、训练器与推理引擎六大核心子系统，每篇只解决一个子系统并给出可操作实践；专家层覆盖强化学习 GRPO、部署导出评测、分布式/序列并行/Megatron/Ray 高性能训练，以及 Loss、Callback、自定义注册、Web-UI 等二次开发扩展点。讲义间通过 depends_on 形成清晰依赖，确保读者按序学习时每一步都有前置知识支撑。

lectures.title: 项目总览与生态定位
lectures.topic: 介绍 ms-swift 是什么、解决什么问题、支持哪些模型与训练任务，以及它在 ModelScope 生态中的定位。
learning_goals: 理解 ms-swift 的定位：大模型与多模态大模型的微调与部署框架
了解支持的训练任务类型：pretrain/sft/rlhf/grpo/评测/量化/部署
认识项目支持的技术栈与硬件范围
minimal_modules: 支持的模型与训练方法概览
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README，列出 ms-swift 支持的 5 种训练任务及对应的一条 CLI 命令示例，并说明它与原生 transformers/peft 的差异。

lectures.title: 安装与环境依赖
lectures.topic: 讲解 ms-swift 的安装方式（pip/uv/源码）、可选依赖分组与运行环境要求。
learning_goals: 掌握 pip 与源码安装 ms-swift 的方法
理解 setup.py 中的 extras_require 分组（megatron/eval/ray 等）
了解 Python/torch/transformers/vllm 等版本要求
minimal_modules: setup.py 的依赖解析与 entry_points
lectures.practice_task: 在本地用源码方式安装 ms-swift（pip install -e .），并执行 `swift --help` 验证安装成功，记录遇到的依赖问题及解决方式。

lectures.title: 目录结构与模块化架构
lectures.topic: 梳理 swift 包的一级目录结构，解释模块化设计理念以及各模块职责。
learning_goals: 掌握 swift/ 下的核心一级模块划分
理解 arguments/pipelines/template/model/dataset/trainers 等模块职责
了解 Architecture.md 描述的模块化扩展思路
minimal_modules: swift 包顶层 _LazyModule 懒加载机制
lectures.practice_task: 依据 Architecture.md 绘制一张 ms-swift 模块依赖关系草图，标注出

lectures.title: CLI 入口与命令分发
lectures.topic: 解析 swift 命令行入口的注册与分发机制，包括子命令路由、torchrun 启动与 YAML 参数解析。
learning_goals: 理解 cli_main 的子命令路由表 ROUTE_MAPPING
掌握 torchrun/多卡启动的判定逻辑 use_torchrun
理解 parse_yaml_args 如何把 yaml/json 配置转成命令行参数
lectures.practice_task: 跟踪 `swift sft ...` 的执行路径，说明它如何被 main.py 路由并通过 torchrun 启动，并写一个最小 YAML 配置文件复现一条 sft 命令。

lectures.title: 快速上手：SFT 训练到推理全流程
lectures.topic: 用一个 LoRA 自我认知微调示例串起 sft 训练、infer 推理、export 推送三个阶段，建立端到端直觉。
learning_goals: 能用 swift sft 跑通一个 LoRA 微调
能用 swift infer 加载 adapter 进行推理
能用 swift export 合并/推送模型
minimal_modules: infer 加载 adapter 推理
lectures.practice_task: 在单卡上复现 README 的 Quick Start：用 Qwen3-4B + alpaca 数据 + LoRA 训练 500 步，再用 swift infer 验证效果，最后用 swift export --merge_lora 合并权重。

lectures.title: Arguments 数据类体系
lectures.topic: 讲解 BaseArguments 通过多继承组合 DataArguments/ModelArguments/TemplateArguments 等的参数体系设计。
learning_goals: 理解 BaseArguments 的多继承组合结构
掌握各 SftArguments/RLHFArguments 等如何派生
了解参数解析 parse_args 与 from_pretrained 机制
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 BaseArguments 的继承链，列出 SftArguments 相比 BaseArguments 额外引入了哪些字段组，并解释为何用 dataclass 组合而非单一巨型类。

lectures.title: 配置文件与命令行参数解析
lectures.topic: 讲解 YAML/JSON 配置文件、ENV 注入、命令行参数与 args.json 持久化的解析流程。
learning_goals: 掌握 parse_yaml_args 的配置展开逻辑
理解 ENV 块的环境变量注入
了解 args.json 在推理时自动回载的机制
lectures.practice_task: 为一条 sft 命令编写等价的 YAML 配置文件（含 ENV 块），用 `swift sft config.yaml` 方式运行并对比输出参数，验证两者一致。

lectures.title: 模型注册与加载机制
lectures.topic: 讲解 MODEL_MAPPING 注册表、ModelLoader、get_model_processor 如何根据模型 id 加载模型与 processor。
learning_goals: 理解 MODEL_MAPPING 与 register_model 注册机制
掌握 get_model_processor/get_processor 的加载流程
了解 ModelInfo/ModelMeta 的作用
lectures.practice_task: 用 get_model_processor 加载一个 Qwen 模型，打印其 model_info 与 model_meta，并说明 ModelMeta 中 template 字段如何与模板系统联动。

lectures.title: 模型架构 ModelArch 与 ModelKeys
lectures.topic: 讲解 ModelArch/ModelKeys/MultiModelKeys 如何描述模型结构，支撑 target_modules 选择与多模态分层控制。
learning_goals: 理解 MODEL_ARCH_MAPPING 与 get_model_arch
掌握 ModelKeys 如何定位 linear/embedding/norm
了解 MultiModelKeys 对多模态 vit/aligner/llm 的分层
lectures.practice_task: 查找某个模型的 ModelArch 定义，说明它的 ModelKeys 指向哪些模块，并解释这如何影响 LoRA 的 target_modules=all-linear 的实际命中范围。

lectures.title: Template 体系与对话格式
lectures.topic: 讲解 Template 基类如何把 messages 对话格式转换为 token 序列，以及 TEMPLATE_MAPPING 注册与 encode 流程。
learning_goals: 理解 Template 基类的职责与 encode/data_collator 流程
掌握 TEMPLATE_MAPPING 与 register_template 注册
了解 TemplateMeta 与 get_template 的匹配逻辑
lectures.practice_task: 用 get_template 取一个 Qwen 模板，对一段 messages 调用 template.encode，打印 input_ids 与 labels，说明 labels 中哪些部分被置为 -100。

lectures.title: 多模态 Template 与特殊 Token
lectures.topic: 讲解多模态模板如何处理 image/video/audio 占位符、特殊 token 与视觉工具函数。
learning_goals: 理解 special_tokens 与 image/video/audio 占位符机制
掌握 vision_utils 的图像/音频加载与预处理
了解多模态模板对 padding_free/packing 的支持差异
minimal_modules: 特殊 token 与占位符
lectures.practice_task: 用一个多模态模型（如 Qwen3-VL）的 template，encode 一条带 image 的对话，打印占位符替换前后的 input_ids，并说明图像像素如何与占位 token 对齐。

lectures.title: 数据集加载与注册
lectures.topic: 讲解 DatasetLoader、DATASET_MAPPING 注册表与 load_dataset 的加载流程，含数据集语法与子集。
learning_goals: 理解 DATASET_MAPPING 与 register_dataset 注册
掌握 DatasetLoader 从本地/hub 加载数据的流程
了解 DatasetSyntax 与 SubsetDataset 的数据集语法
lectures.practice_task: 用 load_dataset 加载一个内置数据集（如 swift/self-cognition）和一个本地 jsonl，对比两者的 DatasetMeta，并解释 `#500` 这类子集语法如何被解析。

lectures.title: 数据预处理器 Preprocessor
lectures.topic: 讲解 RowPreprocessor 及 Alpaca/Messages/Response 等预处理器如何把原始数据规范化为统一格式。
learning_goals: 理解 RowPreprocessor 的列映射与清理逻辑
掌握 Alpaca/Messages/Response 预处理器的适用场景
了解 AutoPreprocessor 的自动选择机制
lectures.practice_task: 准备一份 alpaca 格式与一份 messages 格式的 jsonl，分别用对应预处理器跑通，输出规范化后的统一 messages 结构，验证两者可被同一 template 消费。

lectures.title: 编码与 Packing 机制
lectures.topic: 讲解 EncodePreprocessor 把文本编码为 token、Packing 与 padding_free 如何提升训练效率。
learning_goals: 理解 EncodePreprocessor 的编码流程
掌握 PackingDataset/IterablePackingDataset 的拼接逻辑
了解 padding_free 与 packing 的适用条件与收益
lectures.practice_task: 对同一数据集分别开启与关闭 packing，统计编码后的样本数与平均长度变化，并说明 padding_free 为何能减少无效 padding。

lectures.title: 自定义数据集格式
lectures.topic: 讲解如何组织和注册自定义数据集，包括 messages/response_format/loss 字段等。
learning_goals: 掌握自定义数据集的标准格式与字段
理解 register_dataset_info 注册自定义数据集
了解 loss 字段与多轮对话数据组织
minimal_modules: 自定义数据集格式规范
lectures.practice_task: 将自己的业务数据整理成 ms-swift 的 messages 格式 jsonl，用 --dataset 指定本地路径跑通一次 sft，并尝试用 register_dataset_info 注册成内置数据集。

lectures.title: TrainerFactory 与训练器体系
lectures.topic: 讲解 TrainerFactory 如何根据 task_type/rlhf_type 选择 Trainer 与 TrainingArguments，以及 Seq2SeqTrainer 的结构。
learning_goals: 理解 TrainerFactory 的 TRAINER_MAPPING 与 TRAINING_ARGS_MAPPING
掌握 task_type 到 Trainer 的派发逻辑
了解 Seq2SeqTrainer/mixin/patcher 的职责
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 TrainerFactory，列出 causal_lm/seq_cls/embedding/reranker 分别对应哪个 Trainer，并说明 task_type 是如何在 args 中被确定的。

lectures.title: TunerPlugin 与模型适配
lectures.topic: 讲解 Tuner/PeftTuner 抽象与 tuners_map，以及 prepare_model/save_pretrained/from_pretrained 适配流程。
learning_goals: 理解 Tuner 基类的三个静态方法契约
掌握 PeftTuner 与 tuners_map 注册
了解 pipelines/train/tuner.py 中如何调用 Tuner 适配模型
lectures.practice_task: 跟踪一次 sft 中 prepare_model 的调用链，说明 Tuner 如何在模型上挂载可训练参数、冻结其余参数，并实现 save_pretrained 只保存 adapter。

lectures.title: LoRA 与轻量微调方法
lectures.topic: 讲解 LoRA/Adapter/LLaMAPro 等 SWIFT_MAPPING 轻量微调方法的原理与配置。
learning_goals: 理解 SWIFT_MAPPING 中各 tuner 的注册
掌握 LoRA/LoRAConfig 的关键参数
了解 peft 集成与 swift_to_peft_format 转换
lectures.practice_task: 分别用 lora、llamapro 两种 tuner 在同一小数据集上微调，对比可训练参数量与显存占用，并解释 lora_rank/lora_alpha/target_modules 的作用。

lectures.title: SFT 训练主流程 SwiftSft
lectures.topic: 讲解 SwiftSft 管道如何串联模型准备、模板准备、数据集准备与 Trainer 训练的完整流程。
learning_goals: 理解 SwiftPipeline 基类与 SwiftSft 的关系
掌握 _prepare_model_tokenizer/_prepare_template/_get_dataset 流程
了解 RayHelper 装饰器与训练启动
minimal_modules: 数据集与 Trainer 串联
lectures.practice_task: 梳理 SwiftSft.main 的执行顺序，画出从参数解析到 trainer.train 的时序图，并指出数据集编码发生在哪个阶段。

lectures.title: 推理引擎抽象与协议
lectures.topic: 讲解 BaseInferEngine 抽象、InferRequest/RequestConfig 协议与 OpenAI 兼容响应结构。
learning_goals: 理解 BaseInferEngine 的 infer/infer_async 接口
掌握 InferRequest/RequestConfig/ChatCompletionResponse 协议
了解 InferClient 与引擎的关系
lectures.practice_task: 用 TransformersEngine 直接构造一个 InferRequest 并调用 infer，打印 ChatCompletionResponse 结构，说明它与 OpenAI API 字段的对应关系。

lectures.title: 多后端推理引擎
lectures.topic: 讲解 Transformers/Vllm/Sglang/Lmdeploy 四种推理后端引擎的实现差异与选用。
learning_goals: 理解四种引擎的继承关系与差异
掌握 infer_backend 切换后端的机制
了解 GRPOVllmEngine 在 RL 中的特殊用途
lectures.practice_task: 对同一模型分别用 transformers 与 vllm 后端推理，对比延迟与输出，并说明切换后端时 template/RequestConfig 如何保持一致。

lectures.title: RLHF 训练流程
lectures.topic: 讲解 SwiftRLHF 管道如何复用 SwiftSft 并接入 DPO/KTO/GRPO 等 RLHF 训练器与参数。
learning_goals: 理解 SwiftRLHF 继承 SwiftSft 的复用设计
掌握 RLHFArguments 与 rlhf_type 派发
了解 reward model 参数与 vllm 支持类型
lectures.practice_task: 用 `swift rlhf --rlhf_type dpo` 跑通一个 DPO 小实验，对比它与 sft 在数据格式与 loss 上的差异，并说明 rlhf_support_vllm_types 包含哪些。

lectures.title: GRPO 算法核心
lectures.topic: 讲解 rl_core 中 GRPO 的优势计算、奖励聚合与 GRPOTrainer 的训练循环。
learning_goals: 理解 GRPOSample 数据结构与 advantage 计算
掌握 compute_rewards_per_func 的多奖励函数聚合
了解 GRPOTrainer 的 rollout+训练循环
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 grpo_algorithm.py，说明一个 batch 的 completions 如何被多奖励函数评分并聚合成 [N, n_funcs] 张量，再追踪 advantage 如何归一化。

lectures.title: 奖励函数与 RM 插件
lectures.topic: 讲解 rewards 模块的 orm/prm 奖励与 rm_plugin 如何接入判别式/生成式奖励模型。
learning_goals: 理解 orm/prm 奖励函数的差异
掌握 DefaultRMPlugin 对带 value head 模型的处理
了解生成式奖励模型（LLM-as-judge）接入方式
lectures.practice_task: 为 GRPO 训练编写一个自定义奖励函数（如根据输出长度或关键词打分），跑通一次小规模训练，并对比加/不加奖励模型插件的效果。

lectures.title: 多轮 Rollout 与环境交互
lectures.topic: 讲解 rollout 模块的多轮调度器、gym 环境与 agent_loop 如何支撑 agent 工具调用训练。
learning_goals: 理解 RolloutScheduler 多轮调度抽象
掌握 gym_env/Env 与 openenv_wrapper 的环境接入
了解 agent_loop 的工具调用循环
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个带工具调用的多轮 GRPO 实验（参考 examples 中 multi_turn），说明 RolloutScheduler 如何在每轮调用工具并把结果回填进对话。

lectures.title: 模型导出与量化
lectures.topic: 讲解 SwiftExport 管道如何完成 merge_lora、量化（GPTQ/AWQ/FP8/BNB）、ollama 导出与 mcore 转换。
learning_goals: 理解 SwiftExport 的分支式 run 流程
掌握 merge_lora 与 quantize_model 的实现
了解 ollama 导出与 hf/mcore 互转
lectures.practice_task: 对一个 LoRA adapter 执行 merge_lora，再用 --quant_method fp8 导出量化模型，对比量化前后的体积与推理效果。

lectures.title: 部署与服务化
lectures.topic: 讲解 swift deploy/app 如何基于 vllm/sglang 启动 OpenAI 兼容服务与交互界面。
learning_goals: 理解 deploy_main 与 run_deploy 的服务启动流程
掌握 app_main 的 Gradio 交互界面
了解 OpenAI 兼容 API 的协议实现
lectures.practice_task: 用 `swift deploy --infer_backend vllm` 启动服务，用 curl/openai 客户端调用 /v1/chat/completions 验证，再启动 swift app 对比交互体验。

lectures.title: 模型评测
lectures.topic: 讲解 swift eval 如何以 EvalScope 为后端完成文本与多模态模型评测。
learning_goals: 理解 eval_main 管道与 EvalScope 后端集成
掌握 eval_backend/eval_dataset 参数
了解评测指标与 infer_backend 的关系
lectures.practice_task: 用 `swift eval --eval_backend OpenCompass --eval_dataset ARC_c` 评测一个模型，记录指标并说明 infer_backend 选择对评测速度的影响。

lectures.title: 分布式训练基础
lectures.topic: 讲解 DDP/DeepSpeed ZeRO/FSDP/device_map 等分布式训练方式的启动与配置。
learning_goals: 理解 torchrun 启动与 NPROC_PER_NODE/NNODES 配置
掌握 DeepSpeed zero2/zero3 与 FSDP 的选用
了解 device_map 简单模型并行
lectures.practice_task: 用 NPROC_PER_NODE=2 + deepspeed zero2 跑通一个多卡 sft，对比单卡与多卡的显存和速度，并解释 zero2/zero3 的差异。

lectures.title: 序列并行 Ulysses 与 Ring-Attention
lectures.topic: 讲解 sequence_parallel 模块如何用 Ulysses 与 Ring-Attention 降低长文本训练显存。
learning_goals: 理解 sequence_parallel.prepare 的接入流程
掌握 Ulysses 与 Ring-Attention 的分片原理
了解 sequence_parallel_size 与 head 数约束
lectures.practice_task: 用 --sequence_parallel_size 2 在长文本数据上训练，对比开启前后的显存峰值，并说明 Ulysses 与 ring-attention 组合时 head 数约束为何被解除。

lectures.title: Megatron-SWIFT 架构总览
lectures.topic: 讲解 swift/megatron 模块的整体架构、mcore-bridge 与 hf/mcore 权重互转。
learning_goals: 理解 megatron 模块的目录与子模块职责
掌握 convert_hf2mcore/convert_mcore2hf 权重转换
了解 mcore-bridge 让 Megatron 像 transformers 一样易用的设计
lectures.practice_task: 用 `megatron` 命令的 convert 流程把一个 hf 模型转成 mcore 格式再转回，对比权重是否一致，并说明 mcore-bridge 的价值。

lectures.title: Megatron 训练流程
lectures.topic: 讲解 MegatronArguments 与 megatron trainers/pipelines 如何实现 TP/PP/SP/CP/EP 并行训练。
learning_goals: 理解 MegatronArguments 的并行参数
掌握 megatron_sft_main 与 MegatronTrainer 流程
了解 TP/PP/SP/CP/EP/VPP 并行策略
lectures.practice_task: 用 `megatron sft --tuner_type lora` 在 2 卡上跑通一个 MoE 或稠密模型训练，记录 TP/PP 配置，并对比与 swift sft 的速度差异。

lectures.title: Ray 分布式调度
lectures.topic: 讲解 ray_utils 的 RayHelper/RayArguments 与 megatron-ray 如何支撑跨机与异步 RL 训练。
learning_goals: 理解 RayHelper.worker/function 装饰器机制
掌握 RayArguments 的参数注入
了解 megatron-ray 在 GRPO/GKD 中的应用
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 RayHelper 在 SwiftSft 中的用法，说明 @RayHelper.worker/@RayHelper.function 如何把方法分发到 Ray actor，并尝试用 try_init_ray 启动一个 ray 会话。

lectures.title: 自定义 Loss 与 Loss Scale
lectures.topic: 讲解 loss/loss_scale 模块如何自定义损失函数与按 token 控制损失权重。
learning_goals: 理解 BaseLoss 与 loss_map 注册
掌握 LossScale 的 get_loss_scale 与 base_strategy
了解 JSON 配置式 loss_scale（精确/正则匹配）
lectures.practice_task: 实现一个自定义 Loss（继承 BaseLoss）并注册到 loss_map，用 --loss_type 跑通 sft；再用 hermes 这类 JSON loss_scale 控制特定 token 权重。

lectures.title: Callbacks、Optimizers 与 Metrics 扩展
lectures.topic: 讲解 callbacks/optimizers/metrics 三类扩展点的注册与使用。
learning_goals: 理解 TrainerCallback 与 callbacks_map 注册
掌握 OptimizerCallback 与 optimizers_map（galore/lorap/muon）
了解 eval_metrics_map 与自定义指标
lectures.practice_task: 实现一个自定义 Callback（如训练开始打印显存），注册并用 --callbacks 指定；再尝试用 galore/lorap 优化器跑一次训练对比显存。

lectures.title: 自定义模型、模板与 Agent 注册
lectures.topic: 讲解如何通过 register_model/register_template/agent_template 注册自定义模型、模板与 Agent 模板。
learning_goals: 掌握 register_model 注册自定义模型
掌握 register_template 注册自定义模板
理解 BaseAgentTemplate 与 agent_template_map
lectures.practice_task: 为一个新模型注册自定义 ModelMeta+Template（或 Agent 模板），用 get_template/get_model_processor 验证可用，并参考 tests 写一个最小测试。

lectures.title: Web-UI 与 App 交互
lectures.topic: 讲解 swift web-ui 与 app 模块如何以 Gradio 提供 zero-threshold 的训练/推理/评测界面。
learning_goals: 理解 web-ui 的启动与 UI 模块组织
掌握 app/build_ui 的界面构建
了解 UI 如何复用 pipelines 与 arguments
lectures.practice_task: 启动 `swift web-ui`，分别体验训练/推理/导出面板，并阅读 build_ui 说明 UI 如何把表单参数映射到对应 arguments 与 pipeline。

aiTitle: 规划 ms-swift 讲义大纲
